import React from "react"; import { Save, Download, X, Link as LinkIcon } from "lucide-react"; const DeckBuilder = ({ token, categories, selectedArticles, setSelectedArticles, handleStatusChange }) => (

Monthly Deck Structure

{categories.map((category) => { // For each category, filter selected articles const categoryArticles = selectedArticles.filter(a => { // DEBUG console.log( `[Category Match DEBUG] Article:`, { id: a.id, title: a.title, a_category: a.category, category_id: category.id, match: a.category === category.id, isPaid: a.hasOwnProperty("score"), } ); return a.category === category.id; }); const Icon = category.icon; return (

{category.name}

{categoryArticles.length} articles
{categoryArticles.length > 0 ? (
{categoryArticles.map(article => (
{article.title}

Source: {article.source || "Unknown"} {article.score !== undefined && ( <> | Score: {article.score} )}

{article.summary && (

{article.summary}

)} {/* Add more fields if needed */} {(article.link || article.meta_data?.link) && ( {article.link || article.meta_data?.link} )}
))}
) : (

No articles selected for this category

)}
); })}

Generate Deck

Deck Settings

Content Options

); export default DeckBuilder;
